_meta.source: Researched from TripAdvisor, Viator, and local guides

bbox_hint.note: Covers downtown Juneau, Mendenhall Glacier, and Auke Bay for whale watching

label_overrides.nugget-falls: Nugget Falls (30 min hike from glacier)

pois.name: Juneau Cruise Terminal
pois.notes: Multiple docks at Egan Drive and AJ Dock. Walking distance to downtown.

pois.name: Downtown Juneau
pois.notes: South Franklin Street shops, Red Dog Saloon, and Tracy's King Crab Shack.

pois.name: Mendenhall Glacier
pois.notes: 12-mile-wide glacier with visitor center, Nugget Falls trail, and icebergs.

pois.name: Nugget Falls
pois.notes: 377-foot waterfall beside Mendenhall Glacier. Easy 30-min hike from visitor center.

pois.name: Mount Roberts Tramway
pois.notes: Aerial tramway from cruise dock to 1,800 feet. Trails, restaurant, and panoramic views.

pois.name: Auke Bay Harbor
pois.notes: Departure point for whale watching tours. 30 min from cruise terminal.

pois.name: Alaska State Museum
pois.notes: Tlingit artifacts, Alaska history, and natural history exhibits.

pois.name: Tracy's King Crab Shack
pois.notes: Legendary crab legs and bisque at the cruise port. Long lines but worth it.

pois.name: Red Dog Saloon
pois.notes: Famous historic saloon with sawdust floors and live music since 1900.

pois.name: Hangar on the Wharf
pois.notes: Popular waterfront restaurant in a converted airplane hangar.

pois.name: Macaulay Salmon Hatchery
pois.notes: Working hatchery with underwater viewing, aquarium, and salmon ladder.

pois.name: Glacier Gardens Rainforest Adventure
pois.notes: Temperate rainforest garden with upside-down trees and glacier views.

pois.name: Herbert Glacier Trail
pois.notes: 4.6-mile trail through rainforest to glacier. Moderate difficulty.

pois.name: Juneau Icefield
pois.notes: 1,500 square miles of ice. Accessible by helicopter for dog-sledding and glacier walks.

pois.name: Gold Creek Salmon Bake
pois.notes: All-you-can-eat grilled salmon in rainforest setting. Bus from cruise port.

pois.name: Treadwell Mine Historic Trail
pois.notes: Ruins of once-largest gold mine in the world. Self-guided walking trail.

pois.name: Pel'meni
pois.notes: Famous late-night Russian dumpling shop. Cash only, no seating, legendary among cruisers.

transit_routes.name: Mendenhall Glacier Shuttle
transit_routes.note: Frequent departures from cruise pier. Allows 1-2 hours at glacier.

transit_routes.name: Whale Watching Transfer
transit_routes.note: Most operators include transfer from cruise terminal.

transit_routes.name: Capital Transit
transit_routes.note: Budget option to glacier. Limited schedule — check times.

featured_experiences.name: Whale Watching & Mendenhall Glacier Combo
featured_experiences.note: #1 rated tour in Juneau. 100% whale spotting success rate. Books up fast.

featured_experiences.name: Helicopter Glacier Dog Sledding
featured_experiences.note: Once-in-a-lifetime experience. Premium price but transformational. Weather dependent.

featured_experiences.name: Best of Juneau: Glacier, Whales & Salmon Bake
featured_experiences.note: Comprehensive day covering all Juneau highlights. Great value for time-limited cruisers.

featured_experiences.name: Mendenhall Lake Kayak & Hike
featured_experiences.note: Unique perspective of glacier from water level. Small groups.
